note: Single source of truth for the alpha's live-slice section. The alpha points at ONE stable URL (BOHEMIA_CURRENT_SLICE.html); this manifest decides which slice that URL shows. Update the slice = bump 'current' + regen the loader (python3 tools/bohemia_slice_host.py). The alpha itself never changes. 'entries' stays short until the game ships, then it can become a real catalog.

entries.title: JUDGE — the neighborhoods
entries.note: YOUR CALL. How a walled Bohemia neighborhood is laid out inside is yours under MAP LAW, and it unlocks homes, then the people who live in them. Three candidate layouts (the loop, cul-de-sacs, garden curve), each from the anatomy. Thumb the ones that feel like Bohemia, kill the rest, comment, hit export. Nothing becomes canon until you pick. Reseed to see the variety each makes.

entries.title: ENTER — the world, walkable
entries.note: The whole world model, playable. You spawn outside a building on a real generated plot. Walk to the door with the arrows, step through, and you are INSIDE the exact rooms the generator made for that building. Walk back out and you are on the plot again. Every wall, room and door is read live from world().plot().building().floorplan() — nothing is hand-placed.

entries.title: THE INTERSECTION — V12
entries.note: Stand in the dead intersection we built. All four stoplights at their approaches, lane markings, crosswalks and medians baked into the ground, corner lamps dark (the grid is dead in act 1). The whole road is walkable — walk up to any signal. Native baked, zero overlay.
